title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - back button
scenario: Find My Device tone continues playing after tapping back arrow instead of stopping and returning to App Settings
steps: Tap on the device name to open Device Settings
Tap Play Tone to start playing a tone on the device
While the tone is playing, tap the Back arrow (top left corner)
expected: The tone stops playing immediately, and the user is returned to the Device Settings page.
